name: integration-grid
title: Integration Grid
description: A responsive grid of integration cards — logo, name, description, and a learn-more link — installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Card grid of integrations, each with a logo, name, description, and learn-more link.

sampleContent.heading: Connect to the tools you already run
sampleContent.subtext: Native integrations across analytics, billing, and messaging — wired in an afternoon.
